author: bsunanda
body:
#### PR description:

Update a few scripts in SimG4CMS/Calo/test/python to enable them to work with different HGCal setups - backport PR#50651

#### PR validation:

Tested in CMSSW_17_0_X and needed for testing different sets of HGCal setups

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Backport of #50651
title: Phase2-hgx465W6 Update a few scripts in SimG4CMS/Calo/test/python to enable them to work with different HGCal setups - backport PR#50651
